title: The Lands Between
imageAlt: The Lord of Frenzied Flame ending scene from Elden Ring
paragraphs: There is a special place in my heart for FromSoft games.
You're often alone in a dying world, but it is strangely... peaceful. Elden Ring, of course, was the Magnum Opus.
If I feel strongly about a game, I may write a blog post about it!
